ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host managing the property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Neighbourhood where the property is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the property */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room offered (e.g., entire home/apt, private room) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for the property */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received for the property */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews received per month */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Count of listings managed by the host */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the property is available for booking in a year */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., house, apartment, condo) */,
  "accommodates" INTEGER /* Number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided by the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Full name of the host */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for host communications */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date when the host started listing properties */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the host */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighbourhood */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in the neighbourhood */,
  "safety_rating" REAL /* Safety rating of the neighbourhood (1-5 scale) */,
  "transportation_rating" REAL /* Transportation rating of the neighbourhood (1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the host to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property whose price is recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for the property at a specific date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "seasonal_pricing" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the price is seasonal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property to which the availability pertains */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which availability is checked */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the property is available on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., guest, host, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking period */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the inquiry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property related to the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent by the potential guest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the inquiry (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., booking, inquiry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., guest, host, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "host_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the host statistics entry */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host to whom the stats belong */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings managed by the host */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating received from guests */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the host to inquiries and reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_host_stats_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property providing the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhood_amenities" (
  "neighbourhood_amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood amenity */,
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighbourhood providing the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighbourhood_amenities_neighbourhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_id") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property to which the photo belongs */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_photos_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being responded to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_verifications" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being verified */,
  "verification_type" TEXT /* Type of verification (e.g., email, phone, ID) */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the verification (e.g., pending, verified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_verifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)
